title: About Arkey Lock | Hot Springs, AR Mobile Locksmith
metaDesc: Learn about Arkey Locksmith, a locally owned 24/7 mobile locksmith serving Hot Springs & nearby Arkansas towns for 15+ years. Licensed & insured. Call.
h1: About Arkey Locksmith — Your Local Hot Springs Locksmith
heroSub: We're a locally owned, fully mobile locksmith team that has helped Hot Springs neighbors with locks and keys for more than 15 years. Real people, real local service.

sections.html:
Our Story

Arkey Locksmith started right here in Hot Springs, Arkansas, and we've stayed local ever since. For more than 15 years we've answered calls from folks locked out of their cars, homes, and businesses all over Garland County. When you call us, you reach a real local locksmith — not a national call center that farms your job out to a stranger.

Being based in town means we know the streets, the neighborhoods, and the lake roads. We can find you fast, day or night. We don't work out of a storefront — we come to you, so most of our work is done right in your driveway, parking lot, or doorway.

What We Do

We're a full-service locksmith. If it has a lock or a key, there's a good chance we can help. Here's the kind of work we handle every week:

Automotive

Car lockouts, broken keys, and new car keys, fobs, and smart keys programmed on site — for far less than the dealership.

Home

House lockouts, rekeying, new deadbolts, broken key removal, and smart lock installs to keep your family safe.

Business

Commercial lockouts, master key systems, access control, and high-security hardware for shops and offices.

RV & Marine

Locks and keys for campers, RVs, and boats — handy with all the lake life around Hot Springs.

Emergency

Locked out at 2 a.m.? We answer 24/7 and head your way fast, any day of the year.

Rekey & Repair

New keys, fresh pins, and fixed hardware so old locks work like new without a full replacement.

Why Choose Us

There are plenty of ways to get a locksmith, but here's why your neighbors keep calling Arkey Locksmith.

  • Locally owned and operated — you talk to us, not a far-off dispatch center.
  • Licensed and insured for your peace of mind.
  • Fully mobile, so we bring the shop to your car, home, or business.
  • Honest, up-front pricing — we explain the cost before we start.
  • Open 24/7, including nights, weekends, and holidays.
  • Discounts for veterans and seniors as a thank-you to our community.

We treat every job like it's a neighbor calling, because most of the time, it is. Give us a ring at (501) 617-8872 and we'll take care of you.

faqs.a: Yes. Arkey Locksmith is fully licensed and insured. That protects you and gives you peace of mind that the work is done right by trained pros.

We're based in Hot Springs and cover the surrounding area, including Hot Springs Village, Lake Hamilton, Pearcy, Magnet Cove, Malvern, Bismarck, and Mount Ida. If you're nearby and not sure, just call (501) 617-8872 and ask.
Yes, we answer calls around the clock, every day of the year — including nights, weekends, and holidays. Lockouts don't keep business hours, and neither do we.
We sure do. We're a fully mobile locksmith, so we bring our tools and equipment right to your location. Most jobs are finished on the spot at your car, home, or business.

faqs.q: Are you a national chain or a local business?
faqs.a: We're locally owned and operated in Hot Springs — not a national call center. When you call, you reach a real local locksmith who knows the area and answers the phone.

keywords: Arkey Locksmith, Hot Springs locksmith, local locksmith, licensed locksmith, insured locksmith, mobile locksmith Arkansas, family owned locksmith
